[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010011 4
1 10001110 4
2 10100001 3
3 10001010 3
4 10111100 5
5 11110010 5
6 10000011 3
7 01010011 4

12 21 10001000 2
23 32 10110000 3
34 43 10000010 2

56 65 00000010 1
67 76 00000010 1
70 07 01010010 3

13 31 10000010 2
24 42 10000000 1
35 53 01010010 3
46 64 10000010 2
57 75 01010010 3
60 06 10000010 2
71 17 00000010 1

03 30 11110010 5 match 5
14 41 10000010 2
25 52 00010000 1
36 63 10000010 2
47 74 00000010 1
50 05 01010011 4 match 0 7
61 16 10001010 3 match 3
72 27 00010000 1

15 51 00000010 1

37 73 01010010 3
